prompt: Working tree has a new benchmark + a Taskfile target that runs it + a README section documenting how. Repo style: Conventional Commits. Commit them.

assertions.text: Produced exactly one new commit beyond the original four (chore: initial, feat: token normalizer, fix: empty tokens, feat: token formatter)
The single commit contains all three coupled files: benches/bench_parse.py, Taskfile.dist.yaml, README.md
Commit subject uses Conventional Commits format (type or type(scope): subject)
Commit body explains what the benchmark measures or motivates the throughput measurement
No commit message contains tooling attribution (no 'Claude', no 'AI', no 'verified by', no 'Co-authored-by' unless requested)
